About the chart
- `plot_boxplot_class`: boxplots of one numeric attribute grouped by a class label.

Didactic goal: complement the plain boxplot example with a grouped version. This is often the more useful view when the analytical question is how the distribution changes across classes.

```{r}
source(url("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cefet-rj-dal/daltoolbox/main/examples/seed.R"))
# install.packages("daltoolbox")

library(daltoolbox)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
```

```{r}
colors <- brewer.pal(3, "Set1")

grf <- plot_boxplot_class(
  datasets::iris[, c("Sepal.Width", "Species")],
  class_label = "Species",
  colors = colors
)
plot(grf)
```
